title: In the US there is a school shooting once every school day
source: The Guardian - The Nation – July - August 2026
content:
In the US there is a school shooting once every school day. Many gunmen are under the infl uence of psychiatric drugs, turning places of learning into killing fi elds. We see the aftermath, but do we understand the cause? WatchPrescription for Violence: Psychiatry’s Deadly Side Effects, a disturbing new documentary that exposes the perils of psychiatric drugging. It’s time to neutralize psychiatry’s deadly pills and protect our youngest and most vulnerable. Forever.
